form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, eased back early on 6th of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, slow going 10 len behind Lord Remlap carrying 55kg at $81. Poorly drawn and prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at Muswellbrook 3yo Mdn-Sw on November 4 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Into Brooklyn with 57kg at $7. First up last campaign 3rd of 7 at Scone Ctry Mdn-Sw on July 11 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.2 len behind Nova Centauri with 56.5kg at $4.80. Ran 3rd in a Scone trial over 900m on April 1. Everything points to a positive return.

form.formComment: Four-year-old mare (Puissance De Lune - Chateau Caronne) who was bought for AUD $ 5,000 (Inglis 2025 DECEMBER (Early) Online Sale). She has six recent trials prior to her debut today. Finished fifth in a Flemington jump-out on November 14. Makes debut on home course and has been well prepared.
